headline: Rachel Reeves to call for rapid AI adoption and deeper ties with EU to boost growth – business live
snippet: 5m ago 08.16 GMT Reeves to push for "Silicon Valley of Europe” in Oxford-Cambridge corridor Chancellor Rachel Reeves will also announce she is ready to use compulsory purchase powers to force through
full_text: 5m ago 08.16 GMT Reeves to push for "Silicon Valley of Europe” in Oxford-Cambridge corridor Chancellor Rachel Reeves will also announce she is ready to use compulsory purchase powers to force through the building of “the Silicon Valley of Europe” in a corridor between Oxford and Cambridge, the Financial Times are reporting. According to the FT: double quotation mark Reeves will tell landowners they will not be allowed to stand in the way of the project, which she is putting at the centre of a revamped growth strategy alongside closer relations with Europe and investments in AI. The chancellor would say in her Mais economics lecture that the government will intervene where landowners are deemed to be blocking developments or insisting on unreasonable demands, government officials said. Share Updated at 08.17 GMT 14m ago 08.08 GMT UK building materials supplier Travis Perkins has cautioned this morning that it faces a ‘subdued’ trading environment.
